expectations.text: Asks multiple intake questions in a single batched message (not drip-by-drip)
expectations.evidence: Delivers 25 questions across 5 sections in one message

expectations.text: Questions are numbered or visually grouped for quick scanning
expectations.evidence: Numbered 1.1-5.5 across five labeled sections with bold headers

expectations.text: Includes the 3 Say Why questions (voice integrity, inside version, jargon test) or signals they will be asked after standard Qs
expectations.evidence: No Say Why module, no voice integrity/inside version/jargon test framing

expectations.text: Acknowledges this is an RP/mission-driven context, not paid-ads
expectations.evidence: Frames as 501c3 nonprofit with lived experience, clients, funders — clearly mission-driven not paid-ads

expectations.text: Asks about voice/narrative/positioning rather than paid-ads product questions
expectations.evidence: Section 4 asks voice/values/non-negotiables; no product SKU or ad-spend questions
